description: Legal document in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: likely 11th century. Involves a woman named [...] bt. Sulaymān b. Yosef; Avraham b. Maṣliaḥ; Muʿizzī dinars; [...] b. Yosef al-Zākī. On verso there are three words in Arabic script (مراسلات مالي فيها).
description_he: מסמך משפטי בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
